title: bun 1.3.10 cross-thread string refcount UAF (crashed Claude Code)

ground_truth.fix_summary: deref the old StringImpl before installing isolatedCopy(); remove the now-redundant orig.deref() in src/string.zig

admission.note: Admit only if baseline (depth-directive, no tool) does NOT reliably reach FULL. Run baseline first.

provenance: Bundled in Claude Code v2.1.50; blamed for `panic: switch on corrupt value`, Windows BSODs, 1GB+ orphan processes, truncated files (Feb-Mar 2026). Fixed upstream by PR #30049.
